segments.text: "Now Elisha the prophet summoned one of the sons of the prophets and said to him,
Tuck your cloak under your belt,[^27] take this flask of oil, and go to Ramoth-gilead.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: When you arrive, look for Jehu son of Jehoshaphat, the son of Nimshi. Go in, get him away from his companions, and take him to an inner room.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Then take the flask of oil, pour it on his head, and declare, ‘This is what the LORD says: I anoint you king over Israel.’ Then open the door and run. Do not delay!
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: "So the young prophet went to Ramoth-gilead,
"and when he arrived, the army commanders were sitting there.
I have a message for you, commander,
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: he said.
For which of us?
segments.speaker: Jehu

segments.text: asked Jehu.
For you, commander,
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: he replied.
"So Jehu got up and went into the house, where the young prophet poured the oil on his head and declared,
This is what the LORD, the God of Israel, says: ‘I anoint you king over the LORD’s people Israel.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: And you are to strike down the house of your master Ahab, so that I may avenge the blood of My servants the prophets and the blood of all the servants of the LORD shed by the hand of Jezebel.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: The whole house of Ahab will perish, and I will cut off from Ahab every male,[^28] both slave and free, in Israel.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: I will make the house of Ahab like the houses of Jeroboam son of Nebat and Baasha son of Ahijah.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: And on the plot of ground at Jezreel the dogs will devour Jezebel, and there will be no one to bury her.’
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Then the young prophet opened the door and ran.
"When Jehu went out to the servants of his master, they asked,
Is everything all right? Why did this madman come to you?
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: You know his kind and their babble,
segments.speaker: Jehu

segments.text: he replied.
That is a lie!
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: they said.
Tell us now!
segments.speaker: Jehu

segments.text: So Jehu answered,
He talked to me about this and that, and he said, ‘This is what the LORD says: I anoint you king over Israel.’
segments.speaker: Jehu

segments.text: "Quickly, each man took his garment and put it under Jehu on the bare steps. Then they blew the ram’s horn and proclaimed,
Jehu is king!
segments.speaker: Jehu

segments.text:
"Thus Jehu son of Jehoshaphat, the son of Nimshi, conspired against Joram.
(Now Joram and all Israel had been defending Ramoth-gilead against Hazael king of Aram,

"but King Joram[^29] had returned to Jezreel to recover from the wounds he had suffered at the hands of the Arameans in the battle against Hazael their king.)
So Jehu said,
If you commanders wish to make me king, then do not let anyone escape from the city to go and tell it in Jezreel.
segments.speaker: Jehu

segments.text: "Then Jehu got into his chariot and went to Jezreel, because Joram was laid up there and Ahaziah king of Judah had gone down to see him.
"Now the watchman standing on the tower in Jezreel saw Jehu’s troops approaching, and he called out,
I see a company of troops!
segments.speaker: Jehu

segments.text: Choose a rider,
segments.speaker: Joram

segments.text: Joram commanded.
Send him out to meet them and ask, ‘Have you come in peace?’
segments.speaker: Joram

segments.text: "So a horseman rode off to meet Jehu and said,
This is what the king asks: ‘Have you come in peace?’
segments.speaker: Joram

segments.text: What do you know about peace?
segments.speaker: Jehu

segments.text: Jehu replied.
Fall in behind me.
segments.speaker: Jehu

segments.text: And the watchman reported,
The messenger reached them, but he is not coming back.
segments.speaker: Jehu

segments.text: "So the king sent out a second horseman, who went to them and said,
This is what the king asks: ‘Have you come in peace?’
segments.speaker: Jehu

segments.text: What do you know about peace?
segments.speaker: Jehu

segments.text: Jehu replied.
Fall in behind me.
segments.speaker: Jehu

segments.text: "Again the watchman reported,
He reached them, but he is not coming back. And the charioteer is driving like Jehu son of Nimshi[^30]—he is driving like a madman!
segments.speaker: Jehu

segments.text: Harness!
segments.speaker: Joram

segments.text:
Joram shouted, and they harnessed his chariot.
Then Joram king of Israel and Ahaziah king of Judah set out, each in his own chariot, and met Jehu on the property of Naboth the Jezreelite.
"When Joram saw Jehu, he asked,
Have you come in peace, Jehu?
segments.speaker: Joram

segments.text: How can there be peace,
segments.speaker: Jehu

segments.text: he replied,
as long as the idolatry[^31] and witchcraft of your mother Jezebel abound?
segments.speaker: Jehu

segments.text: "Joram turned around[^32] and fled, calling out to Ahaziah,
Treachery, Ahaziah!
segments.speaker: Joram

segments.text: "Then Jehu drew his bow and shot Joram between the shoulders. The arrow pierced his heart, and he slumped down in his chariot.
"And Jehu said to Bidkar his officer,
Pick him up and throw him into the field of Naboth the Jezreelite. For remember that when you and I were riding together behind his father Ahab, the LORD lifted up this burden against him:
segments.speaker: Jehu

segments.text: ‘As surely as I saw the blood of Naboth and the blood of his sons yesterday, declares the LORD, so will I repay you on this plot of ground, declares the LORD.’ Now then, according to the word of the LORD, pick him up and throw him on the plot of ground.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text:
"When King Ahaziah of Judah saw this, he fled up the road toward Beth-haggan.
And Jehu pursued him, shouting,
Shoot him too!
segments.speaker: Jehu

segments.text: So they shot Ahaziah in his chariot on the Ascent of Gur,[^33] near Ibleam, and he fled to Megiddo and died there.
"Then his servants carried him by chariot to Jerusalem and buried him with his fathers in his tomb in the City of David.
"(In the eleventh year of Joram son of Ahab, Ahaziah had become king over Judah.)
"Now when Jehu arrived in Jezreel, Jezebel heard of it. So she painted her eyes, adorned her head, and looked down from a window.
"And as Jehu entered the gate, she asked,
Have you come in peace, O Zimri, murderer of your master?
segments.speaker: Jezebel

segments.text: "He looked up at the window and called out,
Who is on my side? Who?
segments.speaker: Jehu

segments.text: And two or three eunuchs looked down at him.
Throw her down!
segments.speaker: Jehu

segments.text:
yelled Jehu.
So they threw her down, and her blood splattered on the wall and on the horses as they trampled her underfoot.
"Then Jehu went in and ate and drank.
Take care of this cursed woman,
segments.speaker: Jehu

segments.text: he said,
and bury her, for she was the daughter of a king.
segments.speaker: Jehu

segments.text: "But when they went out to bury her, they found nothing but her skull, her feet, and the palms of her hands.
"So they went back and told Jehu, who replied,
This is the word of the LORD, which He spoke through His servant Elijah the Tishbite: ‘On the plot of ground at Jezreel the dogs will devour the flesh of Jezebel.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: And Jezebel’s body will lie like dung in the field on the plot of ground at Jezreel, so that no one can say: This is Jezebel.’[^35]
segments.speaker: The LORD
